headline: Dollar Tree shoppers spot troubling trend in stores
summary: For years, Dollar Tree was a go-to destination for budget shoppers looking for bargains. But more recently, the chain has fallen out of favor with a big chunk of its core audience. A big part of that has to do with Dollar Tree's new multi-price strategy. It used to be that when you walked into ...
